name: Diabetic Retinopathy - Fundoscopy Procedure Query
description: **Seventh Procedure-resource phenotype.** Tests ability to find DR patients via camera fundoscopy — the standard retinal photography used for DR screening and surveillance.
prompt: Find patients who have undergone a fundoscopic eye examination (camera fundoscopy).

prompts.broad: Find Procedure resources for camera fundoscopy — the retinal photography procedure used to screen and monitor diabetic retinopathy.
prompts.expert: I need Procedure resources for fundoscopic eye examination. Use SNOMED code 314971001 (Camera fundoscopy). Query: Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|314971001

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with camera fundoscopy. **Seventh Procedure-resource phenotype** in suite (after CHD revasc, polysomnography, colonoscopy, prostate biopsy, EEG, chest X-ray). First ophthalmological procedure type.
